terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
terms.description: Read carefully our platform's terms and conditions of use.
terms.welcome: Welcome to Liberty Club, the decentralized e-commerce platform designed to facilitate the exchange of goods and services without third-party intermediation, leveraging blockchain technology as a facilitator of transactions. By using Liberty Club, you accept these Terms and Conditions of Use. If you do not agree with them, we ask that you do not use our services.

definitionsList.user: "User": any person who uses Liberty Club.
definitionsList.seller: "Seller": any user who offers goods or services on the platform.
definitionsList.buyer: "Buyer": any user who acquires goods or services on the platform.
definitionsList.transaction: "Transaction": any exchange of goods, services or digital assets carried out within the platform.
definitionsList.blockchain: "Blockchain": technology used for creating immutable digital records and transferring cryptocurrencies without intermediaries.

terms.useOfPlatform21: 2.1. Liberty Club allows users to buy and sell goods and services using blockchain technology.
terms.useOfPlatform22: 2.2. Liberty Club does not act as an intermediary in transactions nor guarantees the quality, security, legality or compliance of the goods or services offered.
terms.useOfPlatform23: 2.3. Each user is fully responsible for compliance with the laws and regulations applicable to their activity on the platform.
terms.useOfPlatform24: 2.4. Users must maintain the security of their accounts and passwords, assuming full responsibility for any activity carried out from their accounts.
terms.useOfPlatform25: 2.5. Liberty Club reserves the right to suspend or delete accounts that violate these Terms and Conditions.
terms.purchaseSale31: 3.1. Sellers are responsible for providing clear, truthful and up-to-date information about the goods and services they offer.
terms.purchaseSale32: 3.2. Buyers must carefully review the conditions of the product or service before completing a transaction, as all purchases are final and cannot be cancelled or reversed.
terms.purchaseSale33: 3.3. Liberty Club does not guarantee nor is responsible for the delivery, condition or conformity of the goods and services offered on the platform.
terms.purchaseSale34: 3.4. Disputes between buyers and sellers must be resolved directly between the parties. Liberty Club may offer tools to facilitate conflict resolution, without assuming any responsibility for the final decision.
terms.payments41: 4.1. All transactions within Liberty Club are final and irreversible.
terms.payments42: 4.2. If a buyer requires a cancellation, refund or adjustment, they must contact the seller directly, as Liberty Club does not intermediate in these processes.
terms.payments43: 4.3. Users are responsible for paying any tax, duty or fee applicable to their transactions.
terms.payments44: 4.4. Liberty Club does not store or manage user funds, but provides technological tools to facilitate secure transactions between parties.
terms.liability51: 5.1. Liberty Club is not responsible for disputes between users, nor for damages, losses or inconveniences arising from the use of the platform.
terms.liability52: 5.2. Users use Liberty Club at their own risk, accepting that the platform only facilitates the connection between buyers and sellers.
terms.liability53: 5.3. Users agree to indemnify and hold Liberty Club harmless from any claim, damage or loss related to their use of the platform.
terms.sanctions61: 6.1. Liberty Club may warn, suspend, restrict or disable accounts of users who violate the law, these terms and conditions or community standards.
terms.sanctions62: 6.2. It is prohibited to offer goods or services that violate local laws, including but not limited to:
terms.sanctions63: 6.3. Liberty Club reserves the right to remove any content without prior notice if it considers that it infringes intellectual property rights or established standards.
terms.intellectual71: 7.1. All intellectual property rights in relation to the platform, including patents, trademarks, copyrights and design, belong to Liberty Club or its licensors.
terms.intellectual72: 7.2. No marketplace content may be copied, reproduced, transmitted or distributed without the prior consent of Liberty Club.
terms.intellectual73: 7.3. Users grant Liberty Club a non-exclusive, royalty-free and perpetual license to use any content or material published on the platform.
terms.fees81: 8.1. Liberty Club may establish fees for its services, which will be notified to users 30 days in advance.
terms.fees82: 8.2. Liberty Club may automatically debit funds from the user's account for the collection of unpaid fees or outstanding debts.
terms.billing91: 9.1. The invoice will be issued in accordance with the tax data registered by the user in their account.
terms.billing92: 9.2. The user may download their invoices within their profile on the platform.
terms.law101: 10.1. These terms are governed by the laws of the Argentine Republic.
terms.law102: 10.2. Any dispute will be submitted to the jurisdiction of the courts of the Autonomous City of Buenos Aires, with users waiving any other jurisdiction that might correspond to them.
terms.modifications111: 11.1. Liberty Club may modify these Terms and Conditions at any time.
terms.modifications112: 11.2. Users are responsible for periodically reviewing the terms and conditions to stay informed of any updates.
terms.digital121: 12.1. Users agree to receive electronic communications from Liberty Club via email, text messages or notifications within the platform.
terms.digital122: 12.2. Any notification, agreement or communication sent digitally will have the same legal validity as a written communication.
terms.acceptanceText: By registering and using Liberty Club, the user declares having read, understood and accepted these Terms and Conditions, assuming the responsibilities established herein.
terms.contactSupport: If you have questions or need assistance, you can contact us through [support email] or in our help center on the platform.
terms.footer: Liberty Club – Transforming commerce with freedom and technology. 🚀

featuresSection.heading: Why choose Liberty Club
featuresSection.subtitle: The future of decentralized commerce. Blockchain, 0% fees and real financial freedom

items.title: Blockchain Security
items.description: Smart contracts guarantee secure and immutable transactions. No intermediaries, no risks. Your money and products are protected by decentralized technology.

items.title: 0% Commissions
items.description: Sell without paying fees. Decentralization removes traditional intermediaries, letting you maximize profits and grow without restrictions.

items.title: Total Transparency
items.description: Every transaction is verifiable and public on the blockchain. Build trust with your customers through decentralized transparency.

items.title: True Decentralization
items.description: Operate without banks or centralized platforms. Enjoy real financial freedom with blockchain technology that runs 24/7 without borders.
